waves.objective: Human-readable profile-aware Workbench with semantic server-rendered pages, navigation, disclosures, and preserved JSON APIs.
acceptance_gates: HTML is the primary presentation; JSON APIs remain available
accessible responsive screens show synthetic/profile/human-review state

waves.objective: Local CSV/YAML portfolio input, immutable snapshot preview/validation/confirmation, source catalogue, provider state, query manifests, and rights boundaries.
acceptance_gates: invalid input is visible and cannot create a snapshot
confirmation creates a new immutable snapshot
all external providers are disabled by default and arbitrary SQL is unavailable
exclusions: licensed or personal data in Git

waves.objective: Explainable risk analytics contracts, limitations-aware reports, agent timelines, and explicit human review.
acceptance_gates: analytics include methodology metadata and evidence
reports and agent runs expose assumptions, warnings, limitations, and review state

rollback: Revert accepted lane commits in reverse integration order to the day0-complete tag; immutable Day 0 records and the ServiceFabric submodule are untouched.
